productDisplayName: Puma Men Drifter Cat II Olive Slippers
description: Walk through your casual hours in absolute comfort in this pair of slippers from Ouma. With an ergonomically curved and padded footbed, and a grippy outsole, stay safe and comfortable on all kinds of surfaces. Upper Wide synthetic leather straps with a toe separator and inner lining in twill tape Ergonomically padded footbed for all day comfort puma branding on the forefoot and heel Outsole TPR outsole with diagonal grooves for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
